info.name: Fireblocks Exchange and Fiat Accounts API

items.docs:
DEPRECATED - Please use the `/exchange_accounts/paged` endpoint.
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

Add an exchange account to exchanges. 

Note: This endpoint currently only supports the following exchanges `INDEPENDENT_RESERVE`,`BIT`, `BITHUMB`, `BITSO`, `CRYPTOCOM`, `BYBIT_V2`, `WHITEBIT`, `HITBTC`, `GEMINI`, `HUOBI`, `GATEIO`, `COINHAKO`, `BULLISH`, `BITGET`, and `LUNO`

To add an exchange account, please use the following [guide](https://developers.fireblocks.com/docs/add-an-exchange-account).

params.name: limit
params.description: number of exchanges per page

items.docs:
Returns a list of the connected exchange accounts in your workspace.
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

params.name: exchangeAccountId
params.description: The ID of the exchange account to return

items.docs:
Returns an exchange account by ID.
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

params.name: exchangeAccountId
params.description: The ID of the exchange account to return

items.docs:
Transfers funds between trading accounts under the same exchange account.
Learn more about Fireblocks Exchange Connectivity in the following [guide](https://developers.fireblocks.com/docs/connect-to-exchanges-and-fiat-providers).
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

params.name: exchangeAccountId
params.description: The ID of the exchange account. Please make sure the exchange supports conversions. To find the ID of your exchange account, use GET/exchange_accounts.

items.docs:
Convert exchange account funds from the source asset to the destination asset. Coinbase (USD to USDC, USDC to USD) and Bitso (MXN to USD) are supported conversions.
Learn more about Fireblocks Exchange Connectivity in the following [guide](https://developers.fireblocks.com/docs/connect-to-exchanges-and-fiat-providers).
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

info.name: Get an asset for an exchange account

params.name: exchangeAccountId
params.description: The ID of the exchange account to return

params.name: assetId
params.description: The ID of the asset to return

items.docs:
Returns an asset for an exchange account.
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

info.name: Get public key to encrypt exchange credentials

items.docs: Return public key

Returns all fiat accounts.
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The ID of the fiat account to return

items.docs:
Returns a fiat account by ID.
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The ID of the fiat account to use

items.docs:
Redeems funds to the linked DDA.
Learn more about Fireblocks FIAT Connectivity in the following [guide](https://developers.fireblocks.com/docs/connect-to-exchanges-and-fiat-providers).
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The ID of the fiat account to use

items.docs:
Deposits funds from the linked DDA.
Learn more about Fireblocks FIAT Connectivity in the following [guide](https://developers.fireblocks.com/docs/connect-to-exchanges-and-fiat-providers).
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin.

params.name: mainAccounts
params.description: Whether to include only main accounts in the response.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Page size for pagination.

params.name: pageCursor
params.description: Page cursor for pagination.

items.docs:
Returns all connected accounts.

**Note:** This endpoint is currently in beta and might be subject to changes.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The ID of the account to fetch.

items.docs:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific connected account by ID.

**Note:** This endpoint is currently in beta and might be subject to changes.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The ID of the account to fetch balances for.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Page size for pagination.

params.name: pageCursor
params.description: Page cursor for pagination.

items.docs:
Retrieve current asset balances for a specific connected account as a flat list (one row per `assetId`, `balanceType`).

**Note:** This endpoint is currently in beta and might be subject to changes.

info.name: Get exchange rates for an account

params.name: accountId
params.description: The ID of the account to fetch rates for.

params.name: baseAssetId
params.description: The ID of the asset to fetch rates for.

params.name: quoteAssetId
params.description: The ID of the asset to get the rates nominally.

items.docs:
Retrieve current exchange rates for converting between specific assets in a connected account.

**Note:** This endpoint is currently in beta and might be subject to changes.

info.name: Get supported trading pairs for an account

params.name: accountId
params.description: The ID of the account to fetch supported pairs for.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Page size for pagination.

params.name: pageCursor
params.description: Page cursor for pagination.

items.docs:
Retrieve all asset trading pairs supported by a specific connected account, including the pair type (`quote`, `market`, `onOffRamp`).

**Note:** This endpoint is currently in beta and might be subject to changes.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Page size for pagination.

params.name: pageCursor
params.description: Page cursor for pagination.

items.docs:
Retrieve a list of all available external providers supporting trading activities through the platform.

**Note:** These endpoints are currently in beta and might be subject to changes. If you want to participate and learn more about the Fireblocks Trading, please contact your Fireblocks Customer Success Manager or send an email to CSM@fireblocks.com.

**Endpoint Permission:** Owner, Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Approver, Editor, Viewer.

Generate a time-limited quote for asset conversion, providing exchange rate and amount calculations.

**Note:** These endpoints are currently in beta and might be subject to changes. If you want to participate and learn more about the Fireblocks Trading, please contact your Fireblocks Customer Success Manager or send an email to CSM@fireblocks.com.

**Endpoint Permissions:** Owner, Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Editor.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: pageSize for pagination.

params.name: order
params.description: ASC / DESC ordering (default DESC)

params.name: accountId
params.description: Filter by accountId.

params.name: providerId
params.description: Filter by providerId.

params.name: statuses
params.description: Filter by order status.

items.docs:
Retrieve a paginated list of orders with optional filtering by account, provider, status, and time range.

**Note:** These endpoints are currently in beta and might be subject to changes. If you want to participate and learn more about the Fireblocks Trading, please contact your Fireblocks Customer Success Manager or send an email to CSM@fireblocks.com.

**Endpoint Permissions:** Owner, Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Approver, Editor, Viewer.

Create an order to buy or sell an asset. If no source is given, an external source will be use.

**Note:** These endpoints are currently in beta and might be subject to changes. If you want to participate and learn more about the Fireblocks Trading, please contact your Fireblocks Customer Success Manager or send an email to CSM@fireblocks.com.

**Endpoint Permissions:** Owner, Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Editor.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The ID of the order to fetch.

items.docs:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific order by its ID.

**Note:** These endpoints are currently in beta and might be subject to changes. If you want to participate and learn more about the Fireblocks Trading, please contact your Fireblocks Customer Success Manager or send an email to CSM@fireblocks.com.

**Endpoint Permissions:** Owner, Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Approver, Editor, Viewer.
